title: Vicloon Plastic Chopping Board Set, 4Pcs Flexible Kitchen Plastic Cutting Board Mats with Food Icons, Non Slip Antimicrobial Easy Hanging Boards, Dishwasher Safety
features: 🍎 【Chopping Board Set】：Set of 4 Color coded plastic cutting board sheets. 4 colorful food icons for different food items .Cut different types of food with different Cutting boards to avoid mixing the taste of the food. This Cutting mat preserves the original taste of the food.
🍐【Flexible】: Each Cutting board (30.5cm * 38cm/12"*15") is easy to store and curl to a certain angle, which is helpful to pour the Chopped food directly into the wok or other containers.

🍅 【Safety & Healthy】: Made of premium eco-friendly PP material, which does't contain harmful substances such as lead and chromium, and the anti-bacterial additives will helpful to your health.Hygienic and food safe!

🍑 【Easy to Storage】: Lightweight, dishwasher safe(90℃), hanging hole design:easy to handle, pull and hang .So you can hang and dry after washing, and store them on your Kitchen wall or inside cupboards or drawers.
🍒【Multi-Occasions】: The Flexible Plastic Cutting Board Mats are perfect for all your Kitchen Cutting needs. Great for Kitchen, restaurants, bars, outdoors, picnic, camping or travel.
description: Product Description Dishwasher safe（<90°） The cutting board is made of high-quality PP material. Unlike many wooden and bamboo boards, our cutting mat is 100% dishwasher safe. You can put your board in the dishwasher for deep cleaning. No oiling or maintenance required! Flexible The vegetable mat is durable and flexible. Each cutting board is easy to store and curl to a certain angle to maintain flexibility for easy cooking or to quickly pour ingredients into a pot or pan. It is also helpful to pour chopped food directly into iron pans or other containers. Easy to storage The cutting board is light in weight and designed with hanging holes. Therefore, you can hang and dry them after washing, and then store them on the kitchen wall or in a cabinet or drawer for convenient storage and space saving Thicker 1.2mm thickness design makes sure that they will not wear out easily. Thicker and more durable than the similar product on the market. No need to worry about leaving a knife mark or cutting through the cutting boards. Non-slip Unlike other smooth cutting boards, the back of our cutting boards is different. The waffle pattern grips the bottom-prevents slipping on most countertops. They are also gentle with knives and cutlery. Antibacterial Made of high-quality PP material, free of harmful substances such as lead and chromium, antibacterial additives are good for health and can ensure the safety and health of you and your family
